description: Switch statement with fallthrough from exec case to safe case (missing break). eval and execSync with function parameter.

expected.notes: userInput flows to eval via handler param-as-source heuristic
userInput flows to child_process.execSync via handler param-as-source heuristic; reachable via switch case 'exec' dispatch
Missing break after exec case causes fallthrough to safe case
Regression guard: child_process.execSync in exec case is reachable via switch dispatch — cfg-unreachable-sink must NOT fire here
